author: @thisfoodhits6205
text: I had the opposite experience. I got a free trial of Apple Music with my new phone and tried it out. I could hear a noticeable difference both in my car and my headphones both of which pair via Bluetooth. Now Spotify sounds tinny and shallow to me. Also I think the interface is way better for making playlists in AM (there’s a whole playlist mode), I love the dedicated app for classical music, and I also appreciate the “album jacket” style info on each album and artist. It’s not great for discovering new music but honestly never found that Spotify helped me in that department either. Always felt like it was just directing me to things other people were listening to, not things that matched the vibe of things I was trying to find similar music to.

text: Maine Music streaming journey 2010 se Saavn (Not JIoSaavn) se shuru ki thi. 3G ke jamane me data mahnga tha to isme 32 Kbps bitrate se 128Kbps support tha main 64 Kbps pe 3G Network me sunta tha. Fir 4G ke jamane me Spotify me shift hua aur ab 5G ke jamane me (From 2024) Apple Music me. Ab main Spotify me wapas nahi jaa raha. Mast sound quality hai lossless audio ke karan bas Spotify ka search feature aur music library thoda bada aur behtar hai, wo thoda miss karunga par famous famous almost sabhi gaane mil hi jaate hain,
